---
id: toggle-mixtape-sync
title: "Toggle mixtape sync"
description: "Enables or disables automatic syncing of the mixtape to Navidrome. Returns an HTML fragment with the updated sync toggle."
sidebar_label: "Toggle mixtape sync"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: api//spotter-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Toggle mixtape sync"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/vibes/mixtapes/{id}/toggle-sync"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Enables or disables automatic syncing of the mixtape to Navidrome. Returns an HTML fragment with the updated sync toggle.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
